query:
UPDATE skills
         SET source_repo = ?1,
             repo_owner = CASE
                 WHEN repo_owner IS NULL OR trim(repo_owner) = '' THEN ?2
                 ELSE repo_owner
             END,
             repo_name = CASE
                 WHEN repo_name IS NULL OR trim(repo_name) = '' THEN ?3
                 ELSE repo_name
             END
         WHERE id = ?4
           AND (source_repo IS NULL OR trim(source_repo) = '')
